---
title: "Búsqueda Hiperparametros Optuna Modelo Izhikevich en experimento de clasificación Iris con codificación por spike única (ss) y decodificación por votación (v)"
output: html_document
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
suppressMessages(library("plotly"))
suppressMessages(library("dplyr"))
suppressMessages(library("DT"))
suppressMessages(library("DescTools"))
suppressMessages(library("tidyverse"))
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
datos = read.csv("all_studies.csv")
```

Parametros usados por neurona:
```{r, echo=FALSE}
data_vals <- tribble(
  ~a,     ~b,    ~c,    ~d,    ~modelo,
  0.02,   0.20, -65,   6,   "tonic spiking",
  0.02,   0.25, -65,   6,   "phasic spiking",
  0.02,   0.20, -50,   2,   "tonic bursting",
  0.02,   0.25, -55, 0.05,  "phasic bursting",
  0.02,   0.20, -55,   4,   "mixed mode",
  0.01,   0.20, -65,   8,   "spike frequency adaptation",
  0.02,  -0.10, -55,   6,   "Class 1",
  0.20,   0.26, -65,   0,   "Class 2"
)

data_vals <- data_vals %>%
  mutate(tipo_neurona = LETTERS[1:n()]) %>%
  select(tipo_neurona, a, b, c, d, modelo)

# Mostrar tabla
print(data_vals)

datatable(data_vals, options = list(pageLength = 10, autoWidth = TRUE))

```

Mejores resultados de cada neurona en 50 trials de optuna por cada neurona.

```{r, echo=FALSE}
# Filtrar trials completos
df_ok <- datos %>% filter(state == "COMPLETE")

# Seleccionar mejor por neurona (minimizar valor)
best_by_neuron <- df_ok %>%
  group_by(study_name) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = value, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- Formato ancho ---
# 1) Mantener solo columnas relevantes
best_long <- best_by_neuron %>%
  select(study_name, value, starts_with("params_"))

# 2) Quitar el prefijo "params_" para mayor claridad
best_wide <- best_long %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("^params_", "", .x), starts_with("params_"))

# Ahora cada fila es un tipo de neurona y cada parámetro es una columna
print(best_wide)

# --- Mostrar tabla interactiva con DT ---
datatable(best_wide, options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE))
```

Grafico de los parametros de las neuronas (Basado en graficos generados por optuna-dashboard)

```{r, echo=FALSE}

# === Config ===
csv_in    <- "all_studies.csv"
direction <- "maximize"  # o "minimize"

# === Leer CSV ===
datos <- read_csv(csv_in, show_col_types = FALSE)

# detectar columna de objetivo (value, value_0, etc.)
value_col  <- grep("^value", names(datos), value = TRUE)[1]
param_cols <- grep("^params_", names(datos), value = TRUE)

# === Hover text seguro (sin errores) ===
datos <- datos %>%
  mutate(
    hover_text = pmap_chr(across(all_of(param_cols)), function(...) {
      params <- list(...)
      param_text <- paste0(
        paste(
          paste0("• ", sub("^params_", "", names(params)), " = ",
                 signif(unlist(params), 6)),
          collapse = "<br>"
        )
      )
      param_text
    })
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hover_text = paste0(
      "<b>", study_name, "</b>",
      "<br>Trial: ", number,
      "<br><b>", value_col, ":</b> ", signif(.data[[value_col]], 6),
      "<br><b>Parámetros:</b><br>", hover_text
    )
  )

# === Calcular mejor valor acumulado ===
datos_step <- datos %>%
  arrange(study_name, number) %>%
  group_by(study_name) %>%
  mutate(
    running_best = if (direction == "maximize")
      cummax(.data[[value_col]]) else cummin(.data[[value_col]])
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# === Plot ===
fig <- plot_ly()

# puntos
fig <- fig %>%
  add_markers(
    data = datos,
    x = ~number, y = ~.data[[value_col]],
    split = ~study_name, colors = "Set1",
    text = ~hover_text, hoverinfo = "text",
    name = ~paste("Objective 0 of", study_name),
    legendgroup = ~study_name,
    marker = list(size = 7, opacity = 0.85),
    selected = list(marker = list(size = 10, opacity = 1)),
    unselected = list(marker = list(opacity = 0.3))
  )

# líneas rectas de best value
fig <- fig %>%
  add_lines(
    data   = datos_step,
    x = ~number, y = ~running_best,
    split  = ~study_name, colors = "Set1",
    name   = ~paste("Best Value of", study_name),
    legendgroup = ~study_name,
    line = list(shape = "linear", width = 3),
    hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Trials por estudio (puntos) + Mejor valor acumulado (línea)",
    xaxis = list(title = "Trial"),
    yaxis = list(title = value_col),
    hovermode = "closest",
    legend = list(groupclick = "togglegroup")
  )

fig
```
